name: Is there a Siri submission form or approval process?
description: No public submission form exists for guaranteed Siri citation.

mainEntity.name: Is there a Siri submission form or approval process?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Siri is not a single public directory you can submit to for guaranteed inclusion. You improve your chances by publishing content that is easy for Apple’s systems to interpret and by maintaining trustworthy information across the web.
acceptedAnswer.description: No public submission form exists for guaranteed Siri citation.
